description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on every push to main and on pull requests to main. Use a matrix strategy with multiple jobs for different environments and compilers, including Ubuntu with gcc-8, gcc-9, clang-6, and clang-9, and MacOS with gcc-9 and clang. For each job, check out the repository, set up environment variables, and run a series of commands to build, test, and upload code coverage.
